title: erigeron × huelsenii
intro: Erigeron × huelsenii, also known as Santa Barbara Daisy, is a hybrid flowering plant that is a cross between the common daisy (Erigeron glaucus) and the fleabane (Erigeron philosophorum). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing swelling, and preventing infection. The health benefits of Erigeron × huelsenii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and aid in digestion, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, and is often consumed raw or dried for its health benefits.
